# Sprint 6.2 Performance Optimization

**Sprint:** Sprint 6. Aggregation And Performance Optimization
**Objective:** Implement aggregation and performance optimization, including aggregation strategy, clustering, materialized views, and separate virtual warehouses.

## Description
Implement performance optimization techniques, including clustering on time and device keys, materialized views for hot queries, and separate virtual warehouses by workload type.

## Deliverable
Implemented performance optimization
